response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the VTuber as Sakura Miko. 2. Detected the song title '好き！雪！本気マジック' from the screen text. 3. Researched the song '好き！雪！本気マジック' and identified the original composer as Mitchie M. 4. Searched for lyrics using the original title and composer. 5. Mapped the scenes: 00:00-04:10 for the song performance, 04:11-05:00 for the talking segment. 6. Populated the JSON with the metadata and lyrics.
response.global_summary: The video features a vocal performance by Sakura Miko singing 'Suki! Yuki! Maji Magic' (Love! Snow! Really Magic!), followed by a brief speaking segment.

scenes.description: Sakura Miko performs the song 'Suki! Yuki! Maji Magic'. She dances while singing. Text '好き！雪！本気マジック' appears in the top-left corner.
